svg.aria-label: Hand-drawn transit-network sketch with a closed station and a detour
svg.text: My transit network - and the detour when Central closed

g.text: the detour I had to take - 9 stops!

text.tspan: My city's transit network (20 stations, 11 lines). I
normally ride Home -> Central -> Work in 5 stops.
But Central, the busiest interchange, is closed for
construction. With the hub gone my only route is
the long way round the edge - 9 stops through
Airport. Central has huge betweenness: kill it and
